package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for cmd_or_main_contains_domain_rules: `main` or `cmd` packages that contain business-rule branches instead of wiring and startup concerns.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule014NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule014NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule014NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario014Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule014NegativeService, input Rule014NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
